_meta.purpose: Seed map of real Chinese ISP ASNs -> province, for scripts.bleedthrough_fetch_prefixes. The fetcher pulls each ASN's announced prefixes from RIPEstat and samples a few per ASN to build config/bleedthrough_prefixes.json.
_meta.not_placeholder: These are REAL, publicly-registered Chinese network ASNs. Fetching their announced prefixes from RIPE is benign public BGP data (no China contact), so this step is safe to run anywhere; only the later curate/pull steps probe China and stay prober-gated.
_meta.province_caveat: Province tags are ASN-level (best-effort): province-specific ASNs (Beijing/Shanghai/Guangdong) give real provincial granularity; the national backbones (AS4134/AS4837/AS9808) are tagged CN. True per-province resolution for regional-firewall detection (e.g. Henan) needs IP-geolocation of sampled prefixes — a documented future refinement.
_meta.probe: the censored domain probed to provoke injection; torproject.org is a long-standing GFW-blocked domain.
